name: kitchen-confidential
description:
Anthony Bourdain's Kitchen Confidential — an executable toolkit for leadership, resilience, and high-performance culture drawn from the brutal, beautiful world of professional kitchens.

Covers 5 use cases:
① Building High-Performance Culture — create a team that operates with precision, pride, and accountability under pressure
② Leadership Under Pressure — lead effectively in high-stress, fast-paced environments
③ The Apprenticeship Mindset — embrace the grind, learn from mentors, earn your place
④ Standards & Integrity — maintain uncompromising standards when no one is watching
⑤ Embracing the Chaos — find beauty and meaning in high-pressure environments.

Trigger when users say: "Kitchen Confidential" "Anthony Bourdain" "Restaurant management" "Kitchen culture" "High-pressure environment" "Team leadership" "How to run a kitchen" "Professional cooking" "Bourdain philosophy"
or mention: Anthony Bourdain / Kitchen Confidential / line cook / kitchen culture / restaurant / high-pressure leadership / mise en place.

Related skills: winning, cant-hurt-me, the-servant, the-essential-drucker, the-happiness-advantage.
useCase: Helps anyone build high-performance teams, lead under pressure, and maintain uncompromising standards — inspired by the brutal wisdom of professional kitchens.
knownRisks: Bourdain's voice is intentionally provocative and raw; adapt his directness to your cultural context.
